---
name: Suggest a new resource
about: Propose an addition to the list
labels: new-resource
---

**Resource name and URL**

**Which section does it belong in?**

**One sentence on what it is**

**One sentence on why a practitioner in a regulated environment would use it**

**Disclosure: are you the maintainer or affiliated with this resource?**
Yes / No

**Does it meet the contributing criteria?**
- [ ] It materially helps a practitioner build, ship, audit, or operate AI in a regulated environment
- [ ] It is usable in production today (not early-stage or vaporware)
- [ ] It is not paywalled where equivalent free content exists elsewhere
